package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for cookie_without_samesite: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `http.Cookie{...}` without `SameSite` set, particularly for auth/session cookies
type CaseCookieWithoutSamesiteDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseCookieWithoutSamesiteModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseCookieWithoutSamesiteRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseCookieWithoutSamesiteModel
}

type CaseCookieWithoutSamesiteService struct {
    repo *CaseCookieWithoutSamesiteRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseCookieWithoutSamesiteAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveCookieWithoutSamesite(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseCookieWithoutSamesiteDTO) error {
    focus := "cookie_without_samesite"
    _ = focus
    http.SetCookie(c.Writer, &http.Cookie{Name: "session", Value: input})
    cookie_samesite_positive := map[string]int{"cookie": 1, "samesite": 2}
    cookie_samesite_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    cookie_positive_0 := map[string]string{"cookie": input}
    _ = cookie_positive_0
    samesite_positive_1 := cookie_samesite_positive["samesite"] + len(input)
    _ = samesite_positive_1
    return nil
}
